field_values.action_summary: Leveraging his new status, John Carter proposes a massive raid on Zodanga to rescue Dejah Thoris and seize wealth. The Thark hordes enthusiastically agree, and a force of 150,000 Green Martians begins their march.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of Carter delivering proposal; Wide sweeping shots of massive army marching; Montage elements showing mobilization
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Army size must visually represent 150,000 units
Time of day transition from daylight to dusk/night
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH024_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the transition from a localized political victory to a massive military mobilization. The sequence must scale from the intimate persuasion of leaders to the overwhelming visual presence of 150,000 Green Martians moving across the plains.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- tars_tarkas
- Thark Hordes

## Required Environments
- thark_city_complex (Assembly Zone and Plains)

## Continuity Constraints
- Army size must visually represent 150,000 units
- Time of day transition from daylight to dusk/night

## Beat List
- BT001: Carter proposes the raid on Zodanga to rescue Dejah Thoris and seize wealth.
- BT002: The Thark hordes enthusiastically agree to the plan.
- BT003: A force of 150,000 Green Martians begins their march.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
